Bug / Task Description: Inclusion proofs fail verification for keys reached by descending into a right subtree, while keys on purely-left paths still verify. The sibling-side bookkeeping recorded while walking down the right branch is inconsistent with how proof verification recombines hashes, so verification rebuilds a root that doesn't match the tree's actual root for the affected keys.
Commit Subject: fix(merkle): record correct sibling side for right-subtree proof steps
